title: Science Appropriations Act, 2026 Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 2026 Department of Justice Appropriations Act, 2026 Department of Commerce Appropriations Act, 2026
summary: Making appropriations for the Departments of Commerce and Justice, Science, and Related Agencies for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2026, and for other purposes.

actions.action: The House Committee on Appropriations reported an original measure, H. Rept. 119-272, by Mr. Rogers (KY).
Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 228.
